originalAlarm.description: `__curr_1644` could be null (null value originating from line 2675) and is dereferenced.

sanitizedDescription: `curr` could be null (null value originating from line 2675) and is dereferenced.
model:
(define-fun __need_malloc_and_calloc () Bool
  false)
(define-fun __STRICT_ANSI__ () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_FEATURE_LS_SORTFILES () Bool
  true)
(define-fun _STDLIB_H () Bool
  false)
reasoning: curr is allocated by malloc() at L65, which can return NULL. curr is dereferenced at L66 (curr->val = rand()%10) without a NULL check — genuine null dereference. No // ERROR at L66 (the // ERROR at L33 marks a different dfree bug). New bug. L65-70 are in main() outside all #ifdef blocks, so the bug fires in all configs. PC = CONFIG_FEATURE_LS_SORTFILES AND !_STDLIB_H AND !__need_malloc_and_calloc: SORTFILES requirement and restrictive !_STDLIB_H both over-constrain the PC.
